mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.member_id, s.plan, s.billing_cycle, s.status, s.started_at, s.next_billing_at, s.cancelled_at, s.expires_at, p.card_company, p.card_number_last4 AS card_last4 FROM sm_subscription s LEFT JOIN ( SELECT member_id, card_company, card_number_last4 FROM sm_payment WHERE status = 'done' ORDER BY approved_at DESC LIMIT 1 ) p ON p.member_id = s.member_id WHERE s.member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sm_subscription (member_id, plan, billing_cycle, status, billing_key, customer_key, started_at, next_billing_at) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{plan}, #{billingCycle}, #{status}, #{billingKey}, #{customerKey}, #{startedAt}, #{nextBillingAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE plan = VALUES(plan), billing_cycle = VALUES(billing_cycle), status = VALUES(status), billing_key = VALUES(billing_key), customer_key = VALUES(customer_key), started_at = VALUES(started_at), next_billing_at = VALUES(next_billing_at), cancelled_at = NULL, expires_at = NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE sm_subscription SET status = 'cancelled', cancelled_at = NOW(), cancel_reason = #{reason}, expires_at = #{expiresAt} WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND status = 'active'
mapper.select: SELECT member_id, plan, billing_cycle, billing_key, customer_key FROM sm_subscription WHERE status = 'active' AND billing_key IS NOT NULL AND next_billing_at <= NOW()
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sm_payment (member_id, subscription_id, payment_key, order_id, order_name, amount, status, method, card_company, card_number_last4, receipt_url, requested_at, approved_at, raw_response) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{subscriptionId}, #{paymentKey}, #{orderId}, #{orderName}, #{amount}, #{status}, #{method}, #{cardCompany}, #{cardLast4}, #{receiptUrl}, #{requestedAt}, #{approvedAt}, #{raw})
mapper.update: UPDATE sm_payment SET status = 'done', payment_key = #{paymentKey}, method = #{method}, card_company = #{cardCompany}, card_number_last4 = #{cardLast4}, receipt_url = #{receiptUrl}, approved_at = #{approvedAt}, raw_response = #{raw} WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sm_usage (member_id, `year_month`) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{yearMonth}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE updated_at = NOW()
mapper.update: INSERT INTO sm_usage (member_id, `year_month`, ${column}) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{yearMonth}, 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE ${column} = ${column} + 1
